creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
radeomkms ---> radeonkms

# /usr/ports/graphics/drm-next-kmod/patch-pkg-message
--- pkg-message.orig	2018-06-25 00:02:20.967435000 +0200
+++ pkg-message	2018-06-25 00:04:10.811411000 +0200
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 The experimental drm-next-kmod port can be enabled for amdgpu (for AMD
 GPUs starting with the HD7000 series / Tahiti) or i915kms (for Intel
 APUs starting with HD3000 / Sandy Bridge) through kld_list in
-/etc/rc.conf. radeomkms for older AMD GPUs can be loaded and there are
+/etc/rc.conf. radeonkms for older AMD GPUs can be loaded and there are
 some positive reports if EFI boot is NOT enabled (similar to amdgpu).
 
 For amdgpu: kld_list="amdgpu"
# End of file
